market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Bret Taylor’s Sierra buys YC-backed AI startup Fragment
articles.description: Sierra, the AI customer service agent startup founded by technologist Bret Taylor, announced today that it has acquired the YC-backed French startup Fragment.

articles.title: Aave rallies DeFi partners to contain fallout from $292 million KelpDAO hack
articles.description: Industry players are coordinating a recovery effort as the year's biggest crypto rattled Aave, with Lido and EtherFi being firsts to offer aid.

articles.title: Anchorage Digital adds Marinade-powered staking strategies for Solana clients
articles.description: The integration with Marinade Finance lets clients earn yield via validator selection strategies while retaining custody and control within a single platform.

articles.title: Instagram tests a new ‘Instants’ app for sharing disappearing photos
articles.description: The app lets users share disappearing photos with their friends that can be viewed only once and remain available for 24 hours.

articles.title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you
articles.description: Noscroll wants to cure doomscrolling with an AI bot that reads the internet for you.

articles.title: Tether freezes $344M USDt stablecoins at US law enforcement request
articles.description: The stablecoin issuer cited "activity tied to unlawful conduct” but no further explanation for the freezing of the dollar-pegged tokens held in two wallet addresses.

articles.title: Bitcoin enters disbelief phase as USDC exchange reserves push above $7.5B
articles.description: A negative Bitcoin funding rate and $7.5 billion in USDC reserves suggest traders may start positioning against the bearish trend. Will BTC price keep rising?

articles.title: MoonPay launches fiat-to-stablecoin virtual accounts in New York
articles.description: MoonPay has expanded its virtual accounts product to New York, allowing businesses to convert fiat into stablecoins and settle funds without prefunding across jurisdictions.

articles.title: Don’t stop hiring humans — stop hiring the wrong humans, Artisan’s founder says
articles.description: Artisan may be known for their bold “Stop Hiring Humans” campaign but the reality is every founder needs to assemble the right team if they want to scale.

articles.title: Inside the $71 million freeze on Arbitrum that has the crypto world questioning what decentralization really means
articles.description: The emergency response prevented stolen funds from moving, but sparked debate over governance, control and the limits of decentralization on Layer 2s.

articles.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
articles.description: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

articles.title: Meta to cut 10% of jobs, or 8,000 employees, report says
articles.description: According to an internal memo, Meta plans to begin its sweeping layoffs on May 20.

articles.title: Crypto advocacy groups call action on market structure bill ‘critical‘
articles.description: More than 120 entities associated with the crypto and blockchain industry signed onto a letter urging US Senators to move forward with a crypto market structure bill.

articles.title: Figure shares sink 9% as $1B lending milestone meets market volatility
articles.description: FIGR stock retreated after a brief rally as shifting sentiment hits crypto-linked equities, even as analysts point to strong growth in the fintech's blockchain-based lending.

articles.title: Bluesky now supports better-quality photos
articles.description: The max size is now 2MB and max resolution is 4000 x 4000.

articles.title: These 3 Ethereum metrics favor an ETH price rally to $6K
articles.description: Ethereum signalled a potential rally to $6,000 as bullish technicals, tightening supply, and rising institutional demand are starting to look like major tailwinds.

articles.title: Microsoft offers buyout for up to 7% of US employees
articles.description: If a worker's years of service at Microsoft plus their age equals 70 or more, they will be eligible for a voluntary retirement buyout.

articles.title: The market repriced DeFi in just 48 hours
articles.description: Di Bartolomeo argues that last weekend the market achieved – in real time – a notable feat that no regulator, auditor or commentator has ever done.

articles.title: Era raises $11M to build a software platform for AI gadgets
articles.description: Era thinks that we will see many form factors of AI hardware, including glasses, rings, and pendants.

articles.title: Meta is revamping its cross-app management system
articles.description: Meta's Accounts Center will transition to the Meta Account, which is supposed to make it easier to manage your experience on various Meta apps and devices.
